candidate_a.title: Personalized Traceability Identity (TI)
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Lack of granular detail connecting payment to specific farmer/crop outcomes in mainstream coffee service channels
candidate_a.core_concept: Connecting consumer spend directly to specific agricultural outcomes or beneficiaries.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A loyalty program where points can be redeemed as direct donations to a specific agricultural school or project associated with the coffee origin.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A manual dashboard tracking customer points and corresponding donations to a partner agricultural project. | Partner with one agricultural project.; Set up a manual tracking system for 10 customers.; Execute one donation cycle.

candidate_b.title: Personalized Traceability Identity (TI)
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Lack of granular detail connecting payment to specific farmer/crop outcomes in mainstream coffee service channels
candidate_b.core_concept: Banking interface enabling customers to link their loyalty point spend directly to local agricultural school endowments
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Transaction routing through blockchain smart-contracts to transparently distribute surplus margins to individual coffee harvesters mentioned on labeling
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Ten-person feedback session simulated via a manual dashboard mapping donations to localized, known agricultural beneficiaries

candidate_a.title: RepairRiddle
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Vetting the legitimacy and relevancy of massive amounts of instructional media
candidate_a.core_concept: Annotation map on exploded parts-view images.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A tool where users can upload an image and add hotspots to identify parts.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A web interface for uploading an image and adding clickable hotspots. | Build image upload; Implement hotspot creation; Add text annotation to hotspots

candidate_b.title: RepairRiddle
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Vetting the legitimacy and relevancy of massive amounts of instructional media
candidate_b.core_concept: Annotation map on procedural image slices identifying likely trouble spots within the manufacturer schematics
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Guided hotspot selection overlaid on visual guides supplied to identify broken components visually
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Interaction of an exploded parts-view image enabling users to pin suspected common failure point warnings

candidate_a.title: SEO Decay Alert System
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Losing existing traffic revenue to un-indexed updates in Google search result pages
candidate_a.core_concept: Threshold alerts triggered by rank fluctuation, mapping back to specific page edit suggestions
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Lightweight wrapper over monitoring data that notifies creators exactly what snippet needs revision
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Plugin analyzing URLs via search metrics to provide alert-based revision suggestions

candidate_b.title: SEO Decay Alert System
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Losing existing traffic revenue to un-indexed updates in Google search result pages
candidate_b.core_concept: Threshold alerts for SEO rank fluctuations.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A monitoring service that alerts content creators when specific pages experience significant rank drops, prompting manual review.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A simple script or manual check that emails users when rank drops below a threshold. | Set up rank tracking for 5 sites.; Define alert thresholds.; Send manual alerts for 30 days.; Gather feedback on utility.

candidate_a.title: Echo Archive
candidate_a.target_user: History buffs and collaborative world builders
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Disconnected storytelling platforms for regional historical facts
candidate_a.core_concept: GPS-located audio logs left by 'Ghosts' that require movement to a specific real-world coordinate to initiate narration.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Location-based point-to-point traversal gameplay that overlays a local-history ghost narrative onto modern landscapes.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Single city square map supporting one tethered narrative mission.

candidate_b.title: Echo Archive
candidate_b.target_user: History buffs and collaborative world builders
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Disconnected storytelling platforms for regional historical facts
candidate_b.core_concept: Location-based storytelling that overlays historical narratives onto modern landscapes.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A location-based app that triggers audio clips when a user reaches specific, pre-defined coordinates in a city.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A single city square map with one tethered narrative mission triggered by GPS proximity. | Implement basic GPS geofencing; Record and integrate one audio narrative; Build simple map interface

candidate_a.title: Event Schedule Peacekeeper
candidate_a.target_user: Chief of Staff to growing leadership teams
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Managing individual goal priorities within restricted master organizational capacity plans.
candidate_a.core_concept: Constraint-based scheduling that prioritizes project milestones over availability.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to define 'critical blocks' and suggests rescheduling based on project milestones.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A calendar plugin that lets users tag meetings as 'milestone-critical' and suggests moving non-critical meetings if conflicts arise. | Define milestone-critical tags; Build calendar API integration; Implement conflict detection; Create suggestion engine

candidate_b.title: Event Schedule Peacekeeper
candidate_b.target_user: Chief of Staff to growing leadership teams
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Managing individual goal priorities within restricted master organizational capacity plans.
candidate_b.core_concept: Constraint-optimization based scheduler prioritizing stated goal achievement rather than empty availability.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: The agent performs impact analysis of moving one 'critical block' by predicting potential schedule collapse based on historical meeting habits.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Plugin interfacing with a public calendar API that suggests reshuffling times based on user-designated project milestones.
